Node started: Derive the canonical partition function Z(T, x) and the entropy S(T, x) for a freely jointed chain of n segments of length l, where x is the end-to-end extension. Express the entropy as an explicit function of temperature T and extension x in the limit of large n.

Node started: Given the entropy S(T, x) derived by helper 1, apply the adiabatic constraint dS = 0 to find the mathematical relationship between temperature T and extension x. Specifically, derive how T(x) evolves as the chain is stretched.
